markdownRemark.html:
webpackstars58.2k is a module bundler.

webpack takes modules with dependencies and generates static assets representing those modules.

Awesome Webpack

Inspired by the awesomestars164.9k list. Feel free to improve this list by contributing!

Twitter

People passionate about Webpack (In no particular order)

  • Sean T. Larkin - @TheLarkInn TPM at Microsoft. Developer Advocate and webpack core team member.
  • Juho Vepsäläinen - @bebraw from SurviveJS and webpack core team member.
  • Eric Clemmons - @ericclemmons VP of Software Development at HigherEdHQ. Webpack member.
  • Patrick Stapleton - @gdi2290 from AngularClass, AngularAir and Angular Universalstars3.8k. Webpack member.
  • Kent C. Dodds - @kentcdodds from PayPal Engineering and JavaScript Air. Webpack member.
  • Johannes Ewald - @Jhnnns: Webpack core team member.
  • Joshua Wiens - @d3viant0ne: Technical Lead for EasyMetrics. Webpack member.
  • Jonathan Creamer - @jcreamer898: Microsoft MVP and Telerik Developer Expert.
  • Kees Kluskens - @keeskluskens: - Software Engineer at Code Yellow, Webpack core team member.

Libraries

Loaders

File Type

  • File Loaderstars1.8k: File loader module for Webpack. -- Maintainer: Webpack Team
  • URL Loaderstars1.4k: URL loader module for Webpack. -- Maintainer: Webpack Team
  • HTML Loaderstars1.1k: HTML loader module for Webpack. -- Maintainer: Webpack Team
  • Raw Loaderstars803: Raw file loader module for Webpack. -- Maintainer: Webpack Team
  • Image Loaderstars161: Image minimizing loader for webpack. -- Maintainer: Andy VanWagoner
  • Responsive Loaderstars555: Loader for responsive images. -- Maintainer: Jeremy Stucki
  • SVG Url Loaderstars218: Loader which loads SVG file as utf-8 encoded Url. -- Maintainer: Hovhannes Babayan
  • json5 Loaderstars72: json5 loader module for Webpack. -- Maintainer: Webpack Team
  • json Loaderstars432: json loader module for Webpack. -- Maintainer: Webpack Team
  • mermaid Loaderstars12: mermaidstars35.8k loader module (diagrams) for Webpack. -- Maintainer: Paul Musso
  • wasm loaderstars612: wasm binary loader module for Webpack. -- Maintainer: Arthur Buldauskas
  • Imagemin Loader/Pluginstars101: Image minimizing loader + plugin for webpack. -- Maintainer: itgalaxy inc.
  • Bin Exec Loaderstars13: Pipe any file through any binary. -- Maintainer: Rafael Milewski
  • GraphQL Loaderstars58: .graphql document loader. -- Maintainer: Stephen Wan
  • C/C++ Loaderstars108: Load native C/C++ files with minimal bundle bloat. -- Maintainer: Scott Lott

Component & Template

  • Angular2 Template Loaderstars205: Inlines html and style's in Angular2 components. -- Maintainer: Sean Larkin
  • Handlebars Loaderstars506: A handlebars template loader for Webpack. -- Maintainer: Paul Carduner
  • Vue Loaderstars4.6k: Webpack loader for Vue.js components. -- Maintainer: Vuejs Team
  • SVG React Loaderstars556 - Webpack SVG to React Component Loader. -- Maintainer: Jerry Hamlet
  • Underscore Loaderstars99 - Underscore and Lodash template loader. -- Maintainer: Emmanuel Antico
  • ngTemplate Loaderstars241 - Angular1 Template Loader. -- Maintainer: Toby Rahilly
  • ngInlineStylesLoaderstars3: Optimizes inlined css of angular components. -- Maintainer: Severin Friede
  • Markup-inline Loaderstars26 Inline SVGs to HTML -- Maintainer: Zhicheng Wang
  • Polymer Loaderstars191 - Loader for Polymer elements. -- Maintainers: Rob Dodson - Chad Killingsworth - Bryan Coulter
  • Tag Loaderstars52 - Loader for Riot tag files. -- Maintainer: Riot Team
  • Twig Loaderstars76 - Twig template loader. -- Maintainer: Zimmo.be Team
  • Auto ngTemplate Loaderstars9: Autodetect Angular 1 templates and load them. -- Maintainer: Yash Kulshrestha
  • Pug Loaderstars397 - Pug template loader (formerly Jade). -- Maintainer: Pug Team
  • Simple Nunjucks Loaderstars16 - Nunjucks template loader. -- Maintainer: ogonkov

Styles

  • Style Loaderstars1.5k: Style loader module for Webpack. -- Maintainer: Webpack Team
  • PostCSS Loaderstars2.7k: PostCSS loader for Webpack. -- Maintainer: PostCSS Team
  • CSS Loaderstars4k: CSS loader module for Webpack. -- Maintainer: Webpack Team
  • SASS Loaderstars3.6k: SASS loader for Webpack. -- Maintainer: Jorik Tangelder
  • Less Loaderstars857: Less loader module for Webpack. -- Maintainer: Webpack Team
  • Stylus Loaderstars484: A stylus loader for webpack. -- Maintainer: Kyle Robinson Young
  • Isomorphic Style Loaderstars1.2k: Isomorphic CSS style loader for Webpack. -- Maintainer: Kriasoft Team
  • Minify CSS-in-JS Loaderstars1: RegExp-based minify CSS-in-JS loader for Webpack, don't need babel. -- Maintainer: Zack Young
  • SASS Resources Loaderstars901: Globally import SASS resources (variables, mixins, etc.). -- Maintainer: ShakaCode

Language & Framework

  • TS Loaderstars3k: TypeScript loader for webpack. -- Maintainer: TypeStrong Team
  • Awesome TypeScript Loaderstars2.4k: Awesome TS loader for Webpack. -- Maintainer: Stanislav Panferov
  • Coffee Loaderstars132: Coffee loader module for Webpack. -- Maintainer: Webpack Team
  • Bootstrap Loaderstars1k: Load Bootstrap styles in your Webpack bundle. -- Maintainer: ShakaCode Team
  • PostHTML Loaderstars34: PostHTML loader for Webpack. -- Maintainer: PostHTML Team
  • ELM Loaderstars530: Webpack loader for the Elm programming language. -- Maintainer: Richard Feldman
  • Fengari Loaderstars28: Run Lua code using Fengari. -- Maintainer: Daurnimator

Utility

  • Babel Loaderstars4.5k: Webpack plugin for Babel. -- Maintainer: Babel Team
  • ESLint Loader: A ESlint loader for webpack. -- Maintainer: Ricardo Gobbo de Souza
  • JSHint Loaderstars68: JSHint loader module for Webpack. -- Maintainer: Webpack Team
  • JSCS Loaderstars23: Run your source through the JSCS style checker. -- Maintainer: Daniel Perez Alvarez
  • Bundle Loaderstars669: Bundle loader for Webpack. -- Maintainer: Webpack Team
  • Worker Loaderstars1.3k: Worker loader module for Webpack. -- Maintainer: Webpack Team
  • Resolve URL Loaderstars496: Resolves relative paths in url() statements. -- Maintainer: Ben Holloway
  • Import Loaderstars499: Imports loader module for Webpack. -- Maintainer: Webpack Team
  • SourceMap Loaderstars296: Extract sourceMappingURL comments from modules. -- Maintainer: Webpack Team
  • Combine Loader - Converts a loaders array into a single loader string. -- Maintainer: James Friend
  • Icon Font Loaderstars87 - Converts svgs into font icons in CSS. -- Maintainer: Forrest R. Zhao
  • Icons Loader - Generates an iconfont from SVG dependencies. -- Maintainer: Mike Vercoelen
  • Modernizr Loader - Get your modernizr build bundled with webpack. -- Maintainer: Peerigon Devs
  • ngRouter Loaderstars47 - AOT capable NgModule lazy loading using angular router -- Maintainer: Shlomi Assaf
  • Lingui Loader - Compile message catalogs on the fly for jsLingui, i18n library -- Maintainer: Tomáš Ehrlich
  • Shell Loaderstars17 - Run an arbitrary shell script on source files. -- Maintainer: Jo Sprague
  • EXIF Loaderstars11 - Extract EXIF- & IPTC-data from your JPGs during build-time. -- Maintainer: Emanuel Kluge
  • esbuild Loaderstars1.6k - Blazing fast alternative to babel-loader, ts-loader, and Terser powered by esbuildstars24.2k. -- Maintainer: Hiroki Osame

Testing

  • Mocha Loaderstars145: Mocha loader module for Webpack. -- Maintainer: Webpack Team
  • Karma Webpackstars818: Use Karma with Webpack. -- Maintainer: Webpack Team
  • Istanbul Webpack pluginstars4: Use Istanbul instrumenter for the whole pack. -- Maintainer: Hagai Cohen

Integration Libraries

  • Dotenv Webpackstars1.1k: Compiles environment variables into your bundle via dotenv. -- Maintainer: Matthew Steele
  • Terse Webpackstars213 - Webpack simplified in a fluent API with presets. -- Maintainer: Eric Clemmons
  • SystemJS Webpackstars27 - Webpack bundling for SystemJS. -- Maintainer: Guy Bedford
  • Gulp Webpack Streamstars1.4k - Run webpack through a stream interface. -- Maintainer: Kyle Robinson Young
  • Webpack Blocksstars3k - Configure webpack using functional feature blocks. -- Maintainer: Andy Wermke
  • Webpackerstars5.1k - Offical webpack gem for integration into ruby on rails projects. -- Maintainer: Rails
  • WebpackAspnetMiddlewarestars51 - Development middleware for ASP.NET 5. -- Maintainer: Frank Wallis
  • Consul Key/Value Webpackstars6: Compiles environment variables into your bundle via Consul KV-store. -- Maintainer: Marlon Maxwel

Webpack Plugins

  • Extract Text Pluginstars4.1k: Extract text from bundle into a file. -- Maintainer: Webpack Team
  • DefinePlugin: Create global constants which can be configured at compile time. -- Maintainer: Webpack Team
  • Compression Pluginstars1.2k: Prepare assets to serve with Content-Encoding. -- Maintainer: Webpack Team
  • Offline Pluginstars4.4k: Offline plugin (ServiceWorker, AppCache) for Webpack. -- Maintainer: Arthur Stolyar
  • Rewire Pluginstars123: Dependency injection for Webpack bundles. -- Maintainer: Johannes Ewald
  • HTML Webpack Pluginstars9.6k: Simplifies creation of HTML files. -- Maintainer: Jan Nicklas
  • Copy Webpack Pluginstars2.6k: Copy files and directories in webpack. -- Maintainer: Len Boyette
  • Split By Pathstars107: Split By Path Webpack Plugin. -- Maintainer: Bohdan Tkachenko
  • SW Precachestars1.4k - Generates a service worker to precache bundle. -- Maintainer: Will Farley
  • CoreJS Pluginstars16 - Core-JS as a webpack plugin. -- Maintainer: PatrickJS
  • Bundle Analyzerstars11k - Utility that represents bundles as an interactive treemap. -- Maintainer: Yuriy Grunin
  • Module Mappingstars23 - Maps modules onto different files. -- Maintainer: Spartez Team
  • Serverless Webpackstars1.5k - Serverless plugin to bundle your lambdas. -- Maintainer: Elastic Coders
  • Prerender SPAstars6.7k - Framework-agnostic static site generation for SPAs. -- Maintainer: Chris Fritz
  • Static Site Generator Pluginstars1.6k - Minimal, unopinionated static site generator. -- Maintainer: Mark Dalgleish
  • SVG Sprite Pluginstars73 - Plugin for SVG sprites and icons. -- Maintainer: Jeremy Tice (TodayTix)
  • Imagemin Webpack Pluginstars668 - Minify images with Imagemin. -- Maintainer: Gregory Benner
  • Prepack Webpack Pluginstars1.1k - A webpack plugin for prepack. -- Maintainer: Gajus Kuizinas
  • Modules CDN Webpack Pluginstars313 - Dynamically load your modules from a CDN. -- Maintainer: Thomas Sileghem
  • Generate package.json Pluginstars49 - Limit dependencies in a deployment package.json to only those that are actually being used by your bundle. -- Maintainer: Paul Myburgh
  • Progressive Web App Manifeststars450 - PWA manifest manager and generator. -- Maintainer: Arthur A. Bergamaschi
  • Friendly errorsstars729 - Recognizes certain classes of webpack errors and cleans, aggregates and prioritizes them. -- Maintainer: Geoffroy Warin
  • FileManager Webpack Pluginstars321 - Copy, move, delete files and directories before and after Webpack builds -- Maintainer: Gregory Nowakowski
  • Fork TS Checker Webpack Pluginstars1.4k - Webpack plugin that runs typescript type checker on a separate process. -- Maintainer: TypeStrong Team
  • Duplicate Package Checker Webpack Pluginstars650 - Warns you when multiple versions of the same package exist in your bundle -- Maintainer: Darren Scerri
  • PurgeCSS Webpack Pluginstars300 - A plugin to remove unused css with purgecss -- Maintainer: Floriel Fedry
  • Circular Dependency Pluginstars634 - Detect modules with circular dependencies when bundling -- Maintainer: Aaron Ackerman
  • webpack-inject-pluginstars77 - A webpack plugin to dynamically inject code into the bundle. -- Maintainer: Adam Dierkens
  • Public Path Manipulation Pluginstars147 - control publicPath of dynamically loaded resources at runtime -- Maintainer: Andrew Goldis
  • Build Notifier Pluginstars151 - Display OS-level notifications for build errors and warnings. -- Maintainer: Rocco Cataldo
  • CSS Cleanup Webpack Pluginstars10 - A plugin to remove duplicated and unused css rules -- Maintainer: Dominik Weber
  • Extension Reloaderstars369 - Hot reloading while developing browser extensions -- Maintainer: Rubens P. G. Cavalcante
  • Htmls Webpack Pluginstars13: Simple and fast multiple-htmls-generating plugin for webpack. -- Maintainer: Zack Young
  • Mini css extract pluginstars4.2k:

Lightweight CSS extraction plugin -- Maintainer: Webpack Contrib

  • build-hash-webpack-pluginstars4 For each build, Webpack generates an in-memory hash allowing to know if two build outputs are the same or not. This plugin writes the described build hash in a separate json file. -- Maintainer: Réda Housni Alaoui
  • webpack-hook-pluginstars22 - run any shell commands before or after webpack builds -- Maintainer: David Kwon
  • Dynamic Vendor Webpack Pluginstars11 - Gives you a way to import vendors with dynamic variable and specific code splitting. -- Maintainer Lilian Saget-Lethias
  • Define Variable Webpack Pluginstars1 - Enhancement of DefinePlugin to store defined things in actual variables. -- Maintainer Lilian Saget-Lethias
  • Shell Script Webpack Pluginstars3 - A plugin for running arbitrary shell scripts when compiler hooks are triggered. -- Maintainer Drew Loomer
  • Stylelint Webpack Pluginstars413: A Stylelint plugin for webpack. -- Maintainer: Ricardo Gobbo de Souza
  • ESLint Webpack Pluginstars129: A ESLint plugin for webpack

. -- Maintainer: Ricardo Gobbo de Souza

  • Exclude Assets Webpack Pluginstars3: A plugin to exclude assets from webpack output based on a path RegExp pattern. -- Maintainer: Klayton Faria
  • Webpack Shell Plugin Nextstars50: A plugin allows you to run any shell commands before or after webpack builds. -- Maintainer: Kuzmin Pavel
  • Gettext Webpack Pluginstars1: Embed localization into your bundle using gettext. -- Maintainer: Juan Luis Paz
  • Node Polyfill Pluginstars34: Polyfill Node.js core modules. -- Maintainer: Richie Bendall
  • Bytenode Pluginstars7: Compile JavaScript into bytecode using bytenode. -- Maintainer: Herbert Treis Neto

Webpack Tools

  • Webpack Dev Middlewarestars2.3k: Middleware which arguments a live bundle. -- Maintainer: Webpack Team
  • Webpack Dev Serverstars6.9k: Serves a webpack app. Updates the browser on changes. -- Maintainer: Webpack Team
  • Webpack Mergestars2.4k - Merge designed for Webpack. -- Maintainer: Juho Vepsäläinen
  • NPM Install Webpackstars1.4k - Automatically install & save deps with Webpack. -- Maintainer: Eric Clemmons
  • Webpack Validatorstars295 - Validates your webpack config with Joi. -- Maintainer: js-dxtools Team
  • Webpack Config Utilsstars252 - Util. to make your webpack config easier to read. -- Maintainer: Kent C. Dodds
  • Angular2 Webpack Toolkitstars16 - Webpack tools and helpers for Angular 2. -- Maintainer: AngularClass
  • Webpack Bundle Analyzerstars11k - Represents bundles as an interactive treemap. -- Maintainer: Yuriy Grunin
  • HJS Webpackstars1.8k: Helpers/presets for setting up webpack with hotloading. -- Maintainer: Henrik Joreteg
  • Webpack Dashboardstars13.8k: A CLI dashboard for webpack dev server. -- Maintainer: Formidable Labs
  • Neutrinostars3.8k: Combines the power of Webpack with the simplicity of presets. -- Maintainer: Eli Perelman
  • Webpack Chainstars2.6k: A chaining API to generate and simplify the mod. of Webpack 2 configurations. -- Maintainer: Eli Perelman
  • Speed Measure Pluginstars1.8k - Measures the speed of your webpack plugins and loaders. -- Maintainer: Stephen Cook
  • packtracker.io - Webpack bundle analysis on every commit, report webpack stats to every pull request.
  • BundleStatsstars151 - Generates bundle report(sizes, assets, modules) and compares the results between different builds. -- Maintainer: Vio
  • Webpack Landing Generatorstars13: Easy way to create landing page that converts. -- Maintainer: Aliaksei Kuncevic
  • Webpack Dev Server Firewallstars12: Prevents access to dev server from unknown IPs. -- Maintainer: Igor Adamenko

Courses

  • Webpack for Everyone - Free Laracasts series by Jeffrey Way
  • Webpack 4 Fundamentals - Brief introduction about Webpack fundamentals by Sean Larkin

Books

  • SurviveJS - Webpack: Free book guiding from a webpack apprentice to master. Covers dev, prod, and advanced topics.

Webpack Examples

  • Webpack Examples: Examples of common Webpack functionality.

Community Examples

Angular

  • Angular2 Webpack Starterstars10.4k - A Webpack driven Angular 2 Starter kit from AngularClass.
  • Angular2 Webpackstars1.3k - A complete, yet simple, starter for Angular 2 using Webpack from Preboot.
  • Angular2 Webpack Visual Studiostars497 - ASP.NET Core, Angular2 with Webpack and Visual Studio from Damien Bod.
  • Angular2 Starterstars69 - Angular2 starter kit with Typescript and Webpack from Brian Schemp.
  • Angular2 SPA - Angular 2 ASP.NET Core Spa from Steve Sanderson.
  • Angular2 Seedstars1k - A simple starter demonstrating the basic concepts of Angular2 from Pawel Kozlowski.

Framework Agnostic

  • Annotated webpack 4 Configstars428 - This is the companion github repo for the An Annotated webpack 4 Config for Frontend Web Development article.
  • ES6 TodoMVC with Webpackstars351 - Repo used to teach webpack. (Check branches). from Kent C. Dodds.

React

  • Create React Appstars87.8k - Create React apps with no build configuration from Dan Abramov.
  • React Starter Kitstars20.7k - Isomorphic web app boilerplate from Kriasoft Team.
  • React Redux Universalstars12k - A starter boilerplate for a universal webapp from Erik Rasmussen.
  • Frontend Boilerplatestars3k - A boilerplate of things that mostly shouldn't exist from TJ Holowaychuk.
  • ReactGostars2.8k - Your One-Stop solution for a full-stack universal Redux from Ken Ding.
  • React Native Calculatorstars5.1k - Mobile, desktop and website Apps with the same code from Benoit Vallon.
  • React Cordova Boilerplatestars206 - TodoMVC example for React with Cordova from Yuval Saraf.
  • React Universallystars1.7k - A starter kit giving you the minimum for a production ready universal react application.
  • Budgeting Applicationstars973 - A fully functional boilerplate application optimized for dev and prod, including PRPL from Modus Create.
  • Razzle Material-UI Styled Examplestars117 - With Styled Components using Express with compression from Erik Engi.
  • React Typescript Starterstars7 - A React + TypeScript + Webpack 4 + React-Router 4 + Redux + React-Redux + Redux-Thunk + PostCSS + Bootstrap 4 boilerplate.
  • Readstars1 - A highly scalable react boilerplate from logustra

Vue

  • Vuadstars0 - A highly scalable vue boilerplate from logustra

Other

  • Juho, Johannes, Tobias & Sean on JavaScript Air - JavaScript Air podcast
  • Webpack interview questionsstars161 - Interview questions with answers.
